use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF PAIN SEVERE ENOUGH TO REQUIRE AN OPIOID ANALGESIC AND FOR WHICH ALTERNATIVE TREATMENTS ARE INADEQUATE

indications.text:
QDOLO is indicated in adults for the management of pain severe enough to require an opioid analgesic and for which alternative
treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids, even at recommended doses [see Warnings and Precautions (5.2...
